component.name: Breadcrumb
component.description: An ordered list of navigation links separated by chevron-right icons. The last item is the current page (non-linked, default text colour). Accepts items as an array of { label, href? }.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Showing the user's location within the page hierarchy below the AppHeader
Any page more than one level deep from the root that benefits from a back-navigation trail

patterns.name: page-header-trail
patterns.description: Breadcrumb placed below AppHeader and above the page title in a Stack.

antiPatterns.reason: A one-item breadcrumb (just the current page) adds no wayfinding value and clutters the layout.
antiPatterns.alternative: Omit Breadcrumb when the page is at the top of the hierarchy.

antiPatterns.scenario: Passing an href to the last item
antiPatterns.reason: The last item represents the current page; linking it is redundant and confusing for screen readers.
antiPatterns.alternative: Omit the href on the last item — the component renders it as plain text with aria-current=page.

purpose.default: Ordered trail of linked items with a non-linked current page label.

states.description: Static trail — no interactive states beyond individual link hover.

keyboardInteractions.action: Move focus between linked breadcrumb items
